@graph.description: CJC-1295 is a synthetic growth hormone releasing hormone (GHRH) analog engineered for a longer half-life than natural GHRH, commonly combined with Ipamorelin in gray-market protocols; its GH/IGF-1 mechanism has early pharmaceutical-development data behind it, but no FDA approval and an uncertain compounding pathway.
@graph.name: CJC-1295
